texto: When the time is right, you might right, you might consider telling Theo that you’ve been in love with him for a long time now.” Lucy sniffed. “And I’m supposed to do this without Milk Duds? As if!” Doris laughed. “You know, being true to yourself takes courage, Lucy. Great joy always requires great risk, and even effort.” “Yeah. OK. But I’ve always been more of a drive-through person.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Donovan Susan: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “When the time is right, you might right, you might consider telling Theo that you’ve been in love…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, falling-in-love, right pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
